title: Proof of the Unseen
description: A horror modpack where you prove THEY are real with your camera
body:
‚ÄúI‚Äã‚Äç‚Äã‚Äå‚Äç‚Äã‚Äç‚Äå‚Äã‚Äç‚Äã‚Äå‚Äç‚Äã‚Äç‚Äå swear I just saw it!‚Äù

It‚Äôs always this way. A glimpse. Something that changes position when it shouldn‚Äôt. Staring eyes coming from the dark where no one is.

Monsters, they say, are not real, and the stories are only paranoia, tricks of the dark, or illusions from an overexcited mind.

Yet the camera never lies.

In Proof of the Unseen, it‚Äôs not merely a game of survival.

It‚Äôs a mission to gather.

Records of the incident.

To a world that won‚Äôt accept it, you‚Äôre trying to convince them by going farther and farther.

The more you descend, the weirder things become. You hear footsteps when it‚Äôs only you. Hearing the sound of your friends, but they are not there. Turning your face towards the place, the figures disappear, but on the video, they‚Äôre perfectly there. Someone or something is out there, and it knows that you see it.

You are not insane.

You are not thinking this.

And if you now have the Footage‚Ä¶

IT'S coming to get ‚Äã‚Äç‚Äã‚Äå‚Äç‚Äã‚Äç‚Äå‚Äã‚Äç‚Äã‚Äå‚Äç‚Äã‚Äç‚Äåyou.
